answer: Roles are admin, analyst, clinician, and viewer. Viewers see aggregates only; clinicians can score risk with limited identifiers; admins can access audit logs.
Phase 0 runs completeness, uniqueness, validity, consistency, and timeliness checks. Critical failures stop the pipeline.
Thumbs-up on certified chat routes is stored in chat_feedback.json. Analysts can promote feedback to learned_answers.json via System Health or scripts/promote_chat_feedback.py.
